channel.title: BF Taxonomy APIs on BF Website
channel.description: Recent content in BF Taxonomy APIs on BF Website

item.title: BF _INP Graph API
item.description: BF _INP Graph API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # The BF _INP APP/API queries the BF _INP Class Type queries BF and generates the BF _INP Taxonomy in graphical format. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy/PPT/_INP With Definitions: https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy/PPT/_INP?ShowDefinitions=true API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.210.91.216:7654") }; //to be updated <-- replace YOUR_USER_NAME and YOUR_KEY client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("user", YOUR_USER_NAME); client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("key", YOUR_KEY); var response = await client.

item.title: BF _MEM Graph API
item.description: BF _MEM Graph API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # The BF _MEM Graph APP/API queries the BF _MEM Class Type queries BF and generates the BF _MEM Taxonomy in graphical format. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy/PPT/_MEM With Definitions: https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy/PPT/_MEM?ShowDefinitions=true API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.210.91.216:7654") }; //to be updated <-- replace YOUR_USER_NAME and YOUR_KEY client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("user", YOUR_USER_NAME); client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("key", YOUR_KEY); var response = await client.

item.title: BF _DAT Graph API
item.description: BF _DAT Graph API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # The BF _DAT APP/API queries BF _DAT Class Type and generates the BF _DAT Taxonomy in graphical format. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy/PPT/_DAT With Definitions: https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy/PPT/_DAT?ShowDefinitions=true API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.210.91.216:7654") }; //to be updated <-- replace YOUR_USER_NAME and YOUR_KEY client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("user", YOUR_USER_NAME); client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("key", YOUR_KEY); var response = await client.

item.title: BF Taxons API
item.description: BF Taxons API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # The current BF Taxonomy comprizes the BF Input/Output Check (_INP), Memory Corruption/Disclosure (_MEM), and Data Type (_DAT) Class Types and the BF Failure (_FLR) Class Type. The BF Taxons APP/API queries the BF Taxonomy and generates the BF Taxon Definitions. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy/BFTaxons API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.

item.title: BF Taxonomy API
item.description: BF Taxonomy API Irena Bojanova, Inventor/Creator, PI & Lead, NIST Bugs Framework (BF), 2014 – ~~~ # //Exclusive Rights Only// The current BF Taxonomy comprizes the BF Input/Output Check (_INP), Memory Corruption/Disclosure (_MEM), and Data Type (_DAT) Class Types and the BF Failure (_FLR) Class Type. The BF Taxonomy APP/API queries the BF Taxonomy and generates the corresponding BF Bug/Weakness Classes in machine-readable (XML, JSON) formats. UI https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy.xml https://10.210.91.216:7654/BFTaxonomy.json API C# HttpClient client = new HttpClient() { BaseAddress = new Uri("https://10.
